parsed.production_notes: The video uses a static AI-generated illustration of a woman with limited, unnatural lip-sync animation. The background is a static image with a simple looping rain overlay. The art style is typical of AI image generators like Midjourney or Stable Diffusion.

characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion, short dark brown wavy hair. Anime/webtoon style features, large brown eyes.
characters.wardrobe: Chunky cream-colored knit turtleneck sweater, small gold hoop earrings.

scenes.setting: Cozy cafe by a window, raining outside, evening, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman stands in the foreground, facing the camera directly. She has short, wavy dark brown hair, fair skin, and large brown eyes in an anime or webtoon illustration style. She is wearing a thick, cream-colored knit turtleneck sweater and small gold hoop earrings. She is positioned inside a cozy cafe, standing next to a large glass window. Outside the window, it is raining, and the blurred lights of a city street at night are visible, including glowing red and green neon signs. On the windowsill beside her, there are two small green potted plants and a stack of old books. The lighting is warm and inviting inside, contrasting with the cool, rainy atmosphere outside.

scenes.visual_description: A young woman in a cream sweater stands by a rainy window in a cafe, speaking directly to the camera. The background features blurred neon city lights. Text overlays appear in a pink speech bubble near her chest, displaying the words she is speaking. The animation is limited to her mouth moving.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I don't need perfect English.
Character A says: I just want to speak with confidence.
Character A says: But for years I felt nervous and scared of making mistakes every time I opened my mouth.
scenes.on_screen_text:
I don't need perfect English
I just want to speak with confidence
But for years
I felt nervous and scared of making mistakes
every time I opened my mouth

scenes.setting: Cozy cafe by a window, raining outside, evening, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: The scene features a young woman in an anime illustration style, standing indoors by a large window. She has fair skin, large brown eyes, and short, dark brown wavy hair. Her outfit consists of a chunky, cream-colored turtleneck sweater and delicate gold hoop earrings. She looks directly forward with a gentle, engaging expression. The background reveals a rainy night in a city, seen through the window glass, with out-of-focus neon signs in red and green illuminating the street. The interior windowsill holds a couple of small potted plants and a neat stack of books. Warm, soft lighting highlights the woman's face and sweater.

scenes.visual_description: The scene continues with the young woman speaking to the camera in the cafe setting. The background remains a rainy city street with neon lights. Pink speech bubbles with text overlays continue to appear, syncing with her dialogue. The visual is a static image with a looping rain effect and lip-sync animation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I understood everything.
Character A says: Netflix, podcasts, songs, no problem.
Character A says: But my brain got lazy because I was training my eyes with subtitles, not my mouth.
Character A says: It's called the 'Crutch Effect'.
Character A says: and it's why your English stays stuck.
scenes.on_screen_text:
I understood everything
Netflix, podcasts, songs, no problem
But my brain got lazy
because I was training my eyes with subtitles, not my mouth
It's called the 'Crutch Effect'
and it's why your English stays stuck

scenes.setting: Cozy cafe by a window, raining outside, evening, warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young woman with an anime-style appearance is framed from the chest up, standing next to a window. She possesses short, wavy dark brown hair, fair skin, and expressive brown eyes. She is dressed in a cozy, cream-colored knit turtleneck sweater and wears small hoop earrings. She maintains direct eye contact with a friendly demeanor. Through the window behind her, a rainy city night is depicted, complete with blurred, glowing neon signs in shades of red and green. The windowsill is decorated with small potted plants and a stack of books. The interior is bathed in warm, comforting light.

scenes.visual_description: The woman continues her monologue in the same cafe setting. The visual remains a static AI-generated image with slight lip movements. Pink speech bubbles with text overlays appear in the lower center of the frame, displaying her spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Then I found Fluently.
Character A says: It uses the APA cycle: Absorb, Practice, and Adjust.
Character A says: It's how we naturally learn to talk.
Character A says: no books, no pressure, just real speaking immersion.

panels.panel_visual_description: The image shows a young woman illustrated in a webtoon style, positioned indoors near a window. She has short, dark brown wavy hair, fair skin, and large, friendly brown eyes. She is wearing a thick cream-colored turtleneck sweater and small gold hoop earrings. She faces the viewer directly with a positive expression. The window behind her looks out onto a rainy city street at night, featuring blurred red and green neon lights. On the windowsill, there are small green potted plants and a stack of books. The lighting creates a warm, cozy indoor atmosphere against the cold, rainy backdrop.

scenes.visual_description: The woman delivers her final call to action in the cafe setting. The background and framing are identical to the previous scenes. Pink speech bubbles with text overlays continue to display her dialogue. The overall tone is encouraging and positive.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Stop training your eyes and start training your mouth.
Character A says: Download Fluently and finally start speaking with confidence.

Stop training your eyes and start training your mouth
